chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-7978 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.33990/2022 3. For hearing of main case 28.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Asad Ashfaq Tola, advocate for the respondent No.3 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Bhoromal, Director Law, Government of Sindh --------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. It was last taken up on 14.03.2023, which is almost two and half years ago, when the learned counsel for the petitioner was given last chance to proceed with case on the next date of hearing. Despite the lapse of two and half years, learned counsel for the petitioner has made no serious efforts to pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of two and half years, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
